steps.title: Use the parallel-line angle fact
steps.content: Lines $m$ and $n$ are parallel, and line $t$ is a transversal. The marked $33^\circ$ angle and angle $x$ are same-side exterior angles, so they are supplementary. This gives the needed angle relationship.

steps.title: Solve for the angle
steps.content:
Subtract $33$ from both sides:
$$x=180-33=147$$
The answer is D.
